     The Numbers Business Report

Adrift (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,445,011Details
International Box Office $26,452,180
Worldwide Box Office $57,897,191
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,588,395
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $858,631
Total $2,447,026
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The true story of two free spirits whose chance encounter leads them first to love, and then to the adventure of a lifetime. As the two avid sailors set out on a journey across the ocean, Tami Oldham and Richard Sharp couldn’t anticipate they would be sailing directly into one of the most catastrophic hurricanes in recorded history. In the aftermath of the storm, Tami awakens to find Richard badly injured and their boat in ruins. With no hope for rescue, Tami must find the strength and determination to save herself and the only man she has ever loved.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,603,039 (36.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.71 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,015 opening theaters/3,015 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $41,282,368

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 1st, 2018 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: June 1st, 2018 (Wide) (Singapore)
June 1st, 2018 (Wide), released as Sürükleniş (Turkey)
June 1st, 2018 (Wide) (Lithuania)
June 15th, 2018 (Wide), released as À Deriva (Portugal)
June 28th, 2018 (Wide), released as Во власти стихии (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: August 21st, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for injury images, peril, language, brief drug use, partial nudity and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2526 (Cert #51589), 5/9/2018)
Running Time: 80 minutes
Plot point: Disaster, Lost At Sea, On a Boat, Romance, Extreme Weather
Subgenre: Survival Drama
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Lakeshore Entertainment, Ingenious Media, Huayi Brothers Pictures Ltd, STX Entertainment, RVK
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The true story of two free spirits whose chance encounter leads them first to love, and then to the adventure of a lifetime. As the two avid sailors set out on a journey across the ocean, Tami Oldham and Richard Sharp couldn’t anticipate they would be sailing directly into one of the most catastrophic hurricanes in recorded history. In the aftermath of the storm, Tami awakens to find Richard badly injured and their boat in ruins. With no hope for rescue, Tami must find the strength and determination to save herself and the only man she has ever loved.
